title: Deep Vectorization of Technical Drawings
abstract: Proposes a deep learning approach for vectorizing technical line drawings. Converts raster images of technical drawings into clean vector representations by learning to predict junctions and connectivity, producing structured SVG output.
method_summary: CNN-based junction detection combined with learned connectivity prediction for end-to-end vectorization of technical line drawings into structured vector graphics.

title: Hand-Drawn Electrical Circuit Recognition using Object Detection and Node Recognition
abstract: Real-time algorithm for automatic recognition of hand-drawn electrical circuits based on YOLO object detection and circuit node recognition. Detects components and extracts circuit topology from hand-drawn sketches.
method_summary: YOLO-based component detection combined with node recognition algorithm for real-time hand-drawn circuit digitization and topology extraction.

title: Room Classification on Floor Plan Graphs using Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Represents floor plans as undirected graphs and leverages graph neural networks to predict room categories. Improves room classification by modeling spatial relationships between rooms as graph structures.
method_summary: GNN-based room classification treating floor plans as graphs with rooms as nodes and adjacency as edges for spatial relationship modeling.

title: Discovering Design Concepts for CAD Sketches
abstract: Discovers reusable design concepts from CAD sketch datasets through unsupervised learning. Identifies recurring geometric patterns and sub-structures that capture design intent in engineering sketches.
method_summary: Unsupervised concept discovery framework extracting reusable geometric patterns from CAD sketch datasets for design understanding.

title: Polygon Detection for Room Layout Estimation using Heterogeneous Graphs and Wireframes
abstract: Neural network based semantic plane detection using polygon representations for room layout estimation. Builds heterogeneous graphs from wireframe detections to predict room polygons.
method_summary: Heterogeneous graph construction from wireframe detections with polygon-based room layout prediction for structured floor plan understanding.

title: Extracting Real Estate Values of Rental Apartment Floor Plans using Graph Convolutional Networks
abstract: Extracts access graphs indicating adjacency relationships from floor plan images of rental apartments. Uses GCN to predict real estate values from floor plan graph representations.
method_summary: Automatic access graph extraction from floor plan images combined with GCN-based value prediction, linking spatial layout to real estate metrics.

title: An Automated Engineering Assistant
abstract: Automatically learns a parser to interpret technical drawings from a set of drawings and expert knowledge. Enables automatic reasoning and learning on top of a large database of technical drawings.
method_summary: Learning-based parser for technical drawing interpretation combining template matching with expert knowledge for automated engineering document understanding.

title: Graph Similarity Learning of Floor Plans
abstract: Learns graph-based similarity metrics for floor plans, enabling retrieval and comparison of architectural layouts through structural graph matching.
method_summary: Graph similarity learning framework for floor plan comparison and retrieval using structural graph representations of room layouts.

title: Relative Drawing Identification Complexity is Invariant to Modality in Vision-Language Models
abstract: Studies how VLMs process drawings in different modalities (bitmap images vs TikZ coordinate traces). Finds that relative identification complexity is preserved across modalities, with image-based representations generally requiring fewer segments.
method_summary: Cross-modal analysis of VLM drawing understanding comparing raster and vector representations, revealing modality-invariant complexity patterns.

title: Generative AI in the Construction Industry: A State-of-the-art Analysis
abstract: Comprehensive analysis of generative AI adoption in construction industry covering text, image, video, and code generation. Provides practical framework for GenAI adoption in AEC workflows.
method_summary: Survey analyzing generative AI applications across construction industry workflows including design, planning, documentation, and quality control.

title: Generative AI Models for Different Steps in Architectural Design
abstract: Reviews generative AI models (GANs, VAEs, diffusion models) applied to different stages of architectural design from initial 3D form generation to final imagery production.
method_summary: Survey mapping generative AI model types to architectural design stages, analyzing capabilities and limitations at each step.

title: Zero-shot Sequential Neuro-symbolic Reasoning for Automatically Generating Architecture Schematic Designs
abstract: Combines generative AI (neuro reasoning) with mathematical program solvers (symbolic reasoning) for automatic architecture schematic design generation without training data.
method_summary: Neuro-symbolic framework combining LLM reasoning with mathematical optimization for zero-shot architectural schematic generation.

title: Enhancing Large Language Models for End-to-End Circuit Analysis Problem Solving
abstract: End-to-end framework enabling LLMs to solve circuit analysis problems including automated homework feedback and question-answering for engineering education.
method_summary: LLM-based end-to-end circuit analysis combining schematic understanding with symbolic computation for automated engineering problem solving.

title: AutoCircuit-RL: Reinforcement Learning-Driven LLM for Automated Circuit Topology Generation
abstract: RL-driven LLM for automated circuit topology generation. Generates 12% more valid circuits and improves efficiency by 14% compared to best baselines while reducing duplicates.
method_summary: Reinforcement learning enhanced LLM for circuit topology generation with validity and efficiency improvements over baseline approaches.

title: Efficient and Effective Representation Learning for Circuit Design at Scale
abstract: Circuit representation learning for electronic design automation enabling critical tasks such as testability analysis, logic reasoning, power estimation, and SAT solving at scale.
method_summary: Scalable circuit representation learning framework for EDA tasks including testability, logic reasoning, and power estimation.

title: Line Drawing Pretraining for Efficient, Transferable, and Human-Aligned Vision
abstract: Shows that models pretrained on line drawings develop stronger shape bias, more focused attention, and greater data efficiency across classification, detection, and segmentation tasks.
method_summary: Line drawing pretraining strategy producing vision models with stronger shape bias and improved data efficiency for downstream visual tasks.

title: Enhancing Structured Reasoning for Vector Graphics Generation with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Enhances structured reasoning for SVG vector graphics generation using reinforcement learning, improving the quality and structural coherence of generated vector outputs.
method_summary: RL-enhanced structured reasoning for SVG generation improving geometric precision and structural coherence of vector graphics output.

title: Rendering-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Vector Graphics Generation
abstract: Rendering-aware RL approach for SVG generation from vision-language models. Addresses the gap between code-level SVG generation and visual rendering quality.
method_summary: RL framework with rendering-aware reward for VLM-based SVG generation, aligning code generation with visual output quality.

title: Evaluating Large Language Models on Vector Graphics Understanding and Generation
abstract: Evaluates LLMs on vector graphics understanding and generation tasks. Examines how well models comprehend and produce SVG representations compared to raster approaches.
method_summary: Benchmark evaluating LLM capabilities for vector graphics (SVG) understanding and generation across multiple model architectures.

title: Tokenizing Strokes for Vector Graphic Synthesis
abstract: Proposes stroke tokenization for vector graphic synthesis, enabling LLMs to generate vector graphics by treating strokes as discrete tokens rather than continuous coordinates.
method_summary: Stroke-level tokenization scheme for LLM-based vector graphic synthesis, bridging discrete language modeling with continuous vector graphics.

title: Vector Graphic Animation via Neural Implicits and Video Diffusion Priors
abstract: Animates vector graphics using layered implicit neural representations combined with video diffusion priors, preserving inherent vector properties like infinite resolution and precise constraints.
method_summary: Neural implicit representation for vector graphic animation with video diffusion guidance, maintaining vector graphics properties during animation.

title: Pro-DG: Procedural Diffusion Guidance for Architectural Facade Generation
abstract: Framework combining procedural shape grammar with diffusion-based image synthesis for controllable photo-realistic facade generation from a single input image.
method_summary: Shape grammar-guided diffusion model for procedurally controllable architectural facade generation with structural consistency.

title: A Review on Geometric Constraint Solving
abstract: Comprehensive review of geometric constraint solving in parametric CAD covering advances in the last 15 years. Covers decomposition-recombination, numerical methods, and emerging AI-based approaches.
method_summary: Survey of geometric constraint solving methods for parametric CAD including graph-based decomposition, numerical solvers, and neural approaches.

title: Learning to Infer and Execute 3D Shape Programs
abstract: Learns to infer and execute 3D shape programs that capture higher-level structure such as symmetry and repetition. End-to-end differentiable model learns shape programs by reconstructing shapes in a self-supervised manner.
method_summary: Self-supervised shape program inference learning higher-level structural patterns (symmetry, repetition) from 3D shapes through differentiable program execution.

title: Learning to Infer 3D Shape Programs with Differentiable Renderer
abstract: Infers 3D shape programs from everyday artifacts by recognizing high-level regularities like symmetry and repetition while possessing low-level primitive details, using differentiable rendering.
method_summary: Differentiable rendering-based shape program inference capturing both high-level structural regularities and low-level geometric primitives.

title: Interpretable Shape Programs
abstract: Generates interpretable shape programs that decompose 3D shapes into meaningful sub-programs with semantic structure, enabling human-understandable shape representations.
method_summary: Interpretable shape program generation decomposing 3D shapes into semantically meaningful sub-programs for human-understandable representations.

title: Discovering Abstractions for Visual Programs from Unstructured Primitives
abstract: Discovers reusable abstractions for visual programs from unstructured primitives. Programs are an increasingly popular representation for visual data, exposing compact, interpretable structure.
method_summary: Abstraction discovery framework for visual programs, learning reusable higher-level constructs from primitive operations for compact shape representation.

title: PyTorchGeoNodes: Enabling Differentiable Shape Programs for 3D Shape Reconstruction
abstract: Differentiable module for reconstructing 3D objects from images using interpretable shape programs. Translates Blender geometry nodes into differentiable PyTorch code for gradient-based optimization.
method_summary: Differentiable shape program framework translating Blender geometry nodes to PyTorch for gradient-based 3D reconstruction from images.

title: Example-driven Visual Program Learning for Generating 3D Object Arrangements
abstract: Learns visual programs from examples for generating 3D object arrangements. Infers spatial relationship programs from example scenes for controllable 3D layout generation.
method_summary: Example-driven visual program learning for 3D scene arrangement generation through spatial relationship program inference.

title: Neural Parametric Surfaces for Shape Modeling
abstract: First piecewise neural surface representation allowing coarse patch layouts of arbitrary n-sided surface patches to model complex surface geometries with high fidelity.
method_summary: Piecewise neural parametric surface representation supporting arbitrary n-sided patches for complex geometry modeling with smooth transitions.

title: Flexible Neural Surface Parameterization
abstract: Flexible neural surface parameterization method for 3D shapes, enabling adaptive surface representations that balance accuracy and compactness for CAD-like geometries.
method_summary: Adaptive neural surface parameterization balancing geometric accuracy with representation compactness for engineering surface modeling.

title: A Unified Differentiable Boolean Operator with Fuzzy Logic
abstract: Unified differentiable boolean operator for implicit solid shape modeling using CSG. Inspired by fuzzy logic, outputs continuous functions differentiable with respect to operator types, enabling joint optimization of primitives and boolean operations.
method_summary: Fuzzy logic-inspired differentiable boolean operator enabling gradient-based optimization of both CSG primitive parameters and operation types.

title: Learning Compact CAD Shapes with Adaptive Primitive Assembly
abstract: Learns compact CAD shape representations through adaptive primitive assembly, decomposing shapes into a small set of geometric primitives with learned assembly operations.
method_summary: Adaptive primitive assembly framework learning compact CAD representations by decomposing shapes into minimal primitive sets with assembly operations.

title: FeaGPT: An End-to-End Agentic AI for Finite Element Analysis
abstract: Fully integrated Geometry-Mesh-Simulation-Analysis (GMSA) pipeline transforming engineering specifications into validated simulation results. Unlike existing tools that automate individual FEA components.
method_summary: End-to-end agentic AI pipeline for FEA covering geometry creation, meshing, simulation, and analysis from engineering specifications.

title: Efficient CAD Parametric Primitive Analysis with Progressive Hierarchical Tuning
abstract: Addresses 2D Parametric Primitive Analysis for CAD with progressive hierarchical tuning. Tackles structural constraint reasoning and limited annotated data challenges in industrial manufacturing.
method_summary: Progressive hierarchical tuning framework for efficient CAD sketch parametric primitive analysis addressing constraint reasoning and data scarcity.

title: Diverse Part Synthesis for 3D Shape Creation
abstract: Neural network methods for synthesizing 3D shapes as part-based representations using graph or hierarchical structures. Generates diverse part variations for creative 3D shape design.
method_summary: Part-based 3D shape synthesis using neural networks with graph/hierarchical representations for diverse shape creation.

title: Idea23D: Collaborative LMM Agents Enable 3D Model Generation from Interleaved Multimodal Inputs
abstract: Multimodal input (text, image, 3D models) to 3D generation framework using collaborative LMM agents. First framework studying 3D AIGC from interleaved multimodal inputs.
method_summary: Collaborative LMM agent framework for 3D generation from interleaved text, image, and 3D model inputs.

title: Collaborative Multi-Modal Coding for High-Quality 3D Generation
abstract: 3D content generation leveraging multi-modal characteristics by projecting into different modalities (RGB images, RGBD, point clouds) for collaborative high-quality 3D generation.
method_summary: Multi-modal collaborative coding framework projecting 3D content across RGB, RGBD, and point cloud modalities for improved generation quality.

title: Captioning and Generating 3D Content via Multi-modal Large Language Models
abstract: Multi-modal LLM framework for both captioning and generating 3D content, bridging language understanding with 3D shape generation and description.
method_summary: Unified MLLM framework for bidirectional 3D content captioning and generation through multi-modal alignment.

title: Text-Image Conditioned 3D Generation
abstract: Survey covering text-image conditioned 3D generation including 3D generation with 2D generative models, native 3D generative models, and multimodal-conditioned generation approaches.
method_summary: Survey of text-image conditioned 3D generation methods spanning 2D-lifting, native 3D, and multimodal conditioning approaches.

title: Omni123: Unified Native 3D Generation and Editing within a Multimodal Framework
abstract: Enables native 3D generation and editing within a unified multimodal framework trained with limited 3D data. Supports text-to-joint-2D-and-3D generation across diverse prompts.
method_summary: Unified multimodal framework for native 3D generation and editing from text prompts with joint 2D-3D output.

title: Procedural Material Generation with Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: Converts procedural materials into standard Python programs and fine-tunes a large VLM to generate such programs from input images. Bridges procedural material authoring with vision-language models.
method_summary: VLM fine-tuning for procedural material program generation from images, converting visual material appearance to executable procedural code.

title: A Software Engineering-Inspired Shape Grammar for Durand's Plates
abstract: Implements a shape grammar system using functional and object-oriented programming principles for modular architectural design, addressing Durand's architectural composition plates.
method_summary: Software engineering-inspired shape grammar implementation for modular architectural design using OOP principles.

title: A Comprehensive Survey on Design and Generation of Virtual Architecture by Deep Learning
abstract: Comprehensive survey on 3D shape generation techniques leveraging deep learning for virtual architecture, covering GANs, VAEs, diffusion models, and transformers for architectural design generation.
method_summary: Survey of deep learning approaches for virtual architecture generation covering generative models, layout synthesis, and building element generation.

title: Automating Computational Design with Generative AI
abstract: Examines AI image generators based on diffusion models for practical use in civil engineering. Addresses challenges of adapting general-purpose generative AI for domain-specific computational design.
method_summary: Analysis of diffusion-based image generators for civil engineering computational design, identifying adaptation challenges and opportunities.

title: Generative AI Application for Building Industry
abstract: Investigates transformative potential of generative AI technologies, particularly LLMs, within the building industry. Covers applications from design assistance to construction documentation.
method_summary: Survey of generative AI and LLM applications in building industry covering design, documentation, and construction workflows.

title: The Scope for AI-Augmented Interpretation of Building Blueprints in Commercial and Industrial Property Insurance
abstract: Investigates AI use in property risk assessment through automated interpretation of building blueprints. Examines commercial and industrial property insurance applications.
method_summary: Analysis of AI-augmented building blueprint interpretation for property insurance risk assessment and automated underwriting.

title: Architectural Practice Process and Artificial Intelligence -- An Evolving Practice
abstract: Reveals that AI is increasingly integrated across various stages of the architectural process, from early conceptualization and site analysis to generative design and construction detailing.
method_summary: Survey of AI integration across architectural practice stages from conceptualization through construction detailing.

title: Learning Floorplan Generation from Layout Graphs
abstract: Learning framework for automated floorplan generation combining generative modeling with user-in-the-loop designs. Enables human users to provide sparse but meaningful constraints for layout generation.
method_summary: Deep generative model for floorplan generation from layout graphs with user-in-the-loop constraint specification.

title: Can LLMs Generate Architectural Design Decisions?
abstract: Exploratory study on whether LLMs can generate architectural design decisions. Suggests LLMs can generate design decisions but further research needed for human-level generation.
method_summary: Evaluation of LLM capabilities for generating architectural design decisions with analysis of quality gaps versus human experts.

title: A Learning-based Approach to Feature Recognition of Engineering Shapes
abstract: Machine learning approach to recognize engineering shape features such as holes, slots, etc. in CAD mesh models. Addresses automatic feature recognition for manufacturing planning.
method_summary: ML-based engineering shape feature recognition (holes, slots, pockets) from CAD mesh models for manufacturing process planning.

title: Simplified Learning of CAD Features Leveraging a Deep Residual Autoencoder
abstract: Deep residual autoencoder for simplified CAD feature learning. Leverages EfficientNet-style architecture for robust and accurate feature extraction from CAD models.
method_summary: Deep residual autoencoder with EfficientNet backbone for simplified yet accurate CAD feature learning and recognition.

title: 3D Shape Completion with Latent Diffusion Models
abstract: 3D shape completion framework unifying multimodal conditioning through latent diffusion model. Leverages both 2D images and 3D partial scans for high-fidelity shape completion.
method_summary: Latent diffusion model for multimodal 3D shape completion combining 2D image and 3D partial scan conditioning.

title: Partial Object Completion with SDF Latent Transformers
abstract: 3D geometric shape completion using SDF latent transformers. Addresses deep understanding of geometric data for completing partial 3D shapes with high fidelity.
method_summary: SDF latent transformer for partial 3D shape completion leveraging learned geometric representations for high-fidelity reconstruction.

title: 3D Modeling from Free-hand Sketches with View- and Structural-Aware Adversarial Training
abstract: Sketch-based 3D modeling addressing sparsity and ambiguity of sketches through view-aware and structural-aware adversarial training for creating high-fidelity 3D models from free-hand sketches.
method_summary: Adversarial training with view and structural awareness for 3D model generation from sparse free-hand sketches.

title: Sketch-Driven 3D Model Generation
abstract: Converts sketches into face segmentation masks using U-Net encoder-decoder, then generates 3D representations renderable from novel viewpoints for sketch-driven 3D modeling.
method_summary: U-Net based sketch-to-segmentation-to-3D pipeline for generating 3D models from 2D sketch inputs.

title: Learning Multimodal Feature-Enhanced Diffusion Models for Zero-Shot Sketch-Based 3D Shape Retrieval
abstract: First exploration of text-to-image diffusion models for zero-shot sketch-based 3D shape retrieval. Addresses cross-modal retrieval challenges between sketches and 3D shapes.
method_summary: Diffusion model-based zero-shot sketch-to-3D retrieval using multimodal feature enhancement for cross-modal matching.

title: A Fully Automated Hybrid Learning Scan-to-BIM Pipeline with Integrated Topology Refinement
abstract: Modular pipeline for generating IFC-compliant BIM models from building scans. Fully automated hybrid learning approach with integrated topology refinement for scan-to-BIM conversion.
method_summary: Hybrid learning scan-to-BIM pipeline combining deep learning segmentation with topology refinement for automated IFC-compliant BIM generation.

title: Assistive Scan to Building Information Modeling
abstract: Assistive framework for scan-to-BIM conversion, leveraging AI to reduce manual effort in creating building information models from 3D scan data.
method_summary: AI-assisted scan-to-BIM framework reducing manual effort in building model creation from point cloud scans.

title: Cloud2BIM: Open-source Automatic Pipeline for Efficient Conversion of Large-scale Point Clouds to IFC Format
abstract: Open-source pipeline integrating advanced algorithms for wall and slab segmentation, opening detection, and room zoning for fully automated point cloud to IFC conversion.
method_summary: Open-source automated pipeline for large-scale point cloud to IFC BIM conversion with wall segmentation, opening detection, and room zoning.

title: Building Point Cloud Completion Benchmarks
abstract: Establishes Building-PCC benchmark dataset for evaluating point cloud completion technologies on building scan data. Addresses incomplete data challenges in architectural point clouds.
method_summary: Benchmark dataset for building point cloud completion evaluating reconstruction quality on real-world architectural scan data.

title: Leveraging Automatic CAD Annotations for Supervised Learning in 3D Scene Understanding
abstract: Leverages automatic CAD annotations to generate training data for supervised learning in 3D scene understanding, addressing the challenge of expensive manual 3D annotation.
method_summary: Automatic CAD annotation generation for supervised 3D scene understanding, reducing manual labeling costs through CAD-derived training data.

title: Model2Scene: Learning 3D Scene Representation via Contrastive Language-CAD Models Pre-training
abstract: Novel paradigm for 3D scene perception using contrastive language-CAD model pre-training. Reduces reliance on large-scale annotated point clouds through CAD-language alignment.
method_summary: Contrastive language-CAD pre-training for 3D scene understanding, transferring CAD model knowledge to point cloud perception.

title: Human-Crafted 3D Primitive Assembly Generation with Auto-Regressive Transformer
abstract: Shape primitive abstraction decomposing complex 3D shapes into simple geometric elements using auto-regressive transformer. Addresses human visual cognition patterns in shape understanding.
method_summary: Auto-regressive transformer for 3D primitive assembly generation decomposing complex shapes into human-interpretable geometric elements.

title: Unsupervised 3D Shape Reconstruction by Part Retrieval and Assembly
abstract: Represents 3D shapes with sets of primitives for structure perception, robotic manipulation, and shape editing. Unsupervised approach combining part retrieval with assembly.
method_summary: Unsupervised part retrieval and assembly framework for 3D shape reconstruction from primitive decomposition.

title: GEMA: Generative Medial Abstractions for 3D Shape Synthesis
abstract: Neural skeleton-based representation encoding information on both shape topology and geometry for 3D shape synthesis through medial axis abstractions.
method_summary: Neural medial axis representation for 3D shape synthesis encoding both topological and geometric information.

title: A Spatial-Aware Generative Model for 3D Shape Completion, Reconstruction, and Generation
abstract: Spatial-aware generative model for 3D shape tasks including completion, reconstruction, and generation. Decomposes shapes into localized components with spatial awareness.
method_summary: Spatial-aware generative model unifying 3D shape completion, reconstruction, and generation through localized component decomposition.

title: An Efficient Deep Neural Network for Automatic PCB Component Detection on the Edge
abstract: Efficient deep neural network architecture for automatic PCB component detection optimized for edge deployment. Addresses visual inspection at scale for manufacturing quality control.
method_summary: Edge-optimized DNN for automatic PCB component detection enabling scalable visual inspection in manufacturing.
